philippines.title: 1Z Entertainment’s new girl group XONARA to bring ‘new flavor’ to P-pop
philippines.description:
XONARA — the first girl group under SB19’s 1Z Entertainment — has made their first entrance to the P-pop scene with a mission to “bring new flavor,” ahead of their scheduled debut on May 15.  After a set of cryptic teasers on social media, XONARA — composed of Eurekah, Ella, Dominique, Tin, Megumi, Lei, and Namie — made their first appearance on SB19’s “Wakas at Simula: The Trilogy Finale” concert on Saturday, April 18. The title of the song was not revealed after their performance, though it contained the hook, “Uy tabi tabi.” The hook was also included in some […]...
Keep on reading: 1Z Entertainment’s new girl group XONARA to bring ‘new flavor’ to P-pop

philippines.title: PH may face first credit downgrade in decades as Fitch turns 'negative'
philippines.description:
MANILA, Philippines – The Philippines’ hard-won sovereign credit rating is under fresh threat after Fitch Ratings lowered its outlook on the country to “negative” from “stable,” pointing to mounting fiscal strains tied to a recent graft scandal and the ongoing global energy shock. A negative outlook signals that the nation’s investment-grade “BBB” rating, which Fitch affirmed, could be cut within the next 18 to 24 months. READ: sp-downgrades-ph-outlook-to-stable Such a move––if it happens at all––would mark the Philippines’ first downgrade in more than two decades. Rising risks The last came in 2005, during the political turmoil that shook the administration […]...
Keep on reading: PH may face first credit downgrade in decades as Fitch turns 'negative'

energy.title: Europe's EV Sales Jump 51% as Iran War Sends Gasoline Prices Soaring
energy.description: Registrations of battery electric vehicles (BEVs) in Europe’s key automotive markets surged by 51% in March as the Iran war pushed gasoline prices to multi-year highs, data published by research firm New Automotive and trade association E-Mobility Europe showed on Monday. More than 224,000 new electric passenger cars were registered in March alone across 15 key EU + EFTA markets, the analysis found. These sales accounted for as much as 22% of all new passenger car sales across the key European markets. In another sign that expensive gasoline…

energy.title: Iran Issues Stark Warning Over U.S. Naval Blockade
energy.description: Iran has warned the world that it cannot and would not guarantee safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz if the United States continues to attempt to restrict Tehran’s oil exports. Following a weekend of twists and turns and escalating tensions, Iran’s First Vice President, Mohammad-Reza Aref, early on Monday said that security at the Strait of Hormuz comes at a cost.     “The security of the Strait of Hormuz is not free. One cannot restrict Iran’s oil exports while expecting free security for others,”…
